en: Coming in from Warner Bros. Studios, it's Conan!
The hell was that? Someone close my eyes!
Get this, gang. Check this out. We've got a lot of laughs!
Get the TV started. Ding dong! Come on in! No!
Go back to sleep. I gotta go use the bathroom.
I gotta go to the bathroom. Best place to have diarrhea. Sure is.
